completed_projects.completion_summary: Implemented modular logic architecture: connective typeclass hierarchy, refactored Propositional and Modal formula types to aligned primitives, created new Temporal and Bimodal formula types, embedding functions with Coe instances, and proof system typeclass hierarchy with polymorphic axioms. All 6 phases completed, lake build passes with zero errors.
